To train and develop skilled Unity Developers ready to contribute to real-world 3D Game Development and Simulation Projects.

Location: Raipur Office (as per availability)
Objective: Build strong practical knowledge of Unity Engine and 3D game development fundamentals.

Key Learning Areas:
1. Unity Interface & Project Structure
2. C# Scripting in Unity
3. 3D Object Manipulation
4. Physics, Collisions, and Animation Systems
5. Lighting, Materials, Shaders
6. UI Development in Unity
7. Prefabs & Asset Management
8. Input Handling (Keyboard, Mouse, Touch)
9. Basic Multiplayer Concepts
10. Building and Exporting Projects

Final Training Project: Build a simple interactive 3D game or simulation.

Phase 2 - 4 Months On-Site Internship
Location: RJPT Informatics Pvt Ltd - Raipur Office
Objective: Apply learned skills by contributing to real-time projects related to 3D Simulation Software and Games.

Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Work on ongoing projects under guidance of senior developers.
2. Develop features/modules in Unity using advanced C# scripting.
3. Implement optimized game mechanics.
4. Integrate external APIs and SDKs as needed.
5. Collaborate with designers, artists, and other developers.
6. Participate in code reviews and team discussions.
7. Test and debug code to meet industry standards.

1. Document project progress regularly.

4. Educational Background: Bachelor's or Diploma in Computer Science, IT, Game Development, or related fields.

6. Understanding of OOP concepts and game programming paradigms.
7. Familiarity with Unity Editor and 3D game development basics.
8. Experience working with version control (Git).
9. Passion for 3D game development and simulations.
10. Good problem-solving attitude and commitment.
11. Serious candidates only.

Program Outcome
1. Industry-ready Unity Developer.
2. Hands-on experience in professional game/simulation development.
3. Strong portfolio with training project + contribution to real projects.
4. Certificate of Internship Completion from RJPT Informatics.

Important Notes
This is a serious, on-site internship program (Raipur Office) after training.
No stipend provided during the training period. Stipend possible during the internship phase based on performance (decided by management).
Only motivated candidates should apply.

description:
About the internship

    This Software Internship focuses on Frappe Framework and ERPNext development, with primary responsibilities centered on debugging, system understanding, and enhancement of existing ERP systems rather than building new systems from scratch. The role involves working extensively on Raven, a forked ERP system, to identify broken features, analyze root causes, and improve workflow-based functionalities while contributing to system stability and performance.

Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Work on Frappe Framework and ERPNext development and customization.
2. Debug and extend custom ERP workflows along with backend and frontend issues.
3. Maintain and enhance existing features within Raven, the forked ERP system.
4. Build and improve modules related to attendance, workflows, and integrations.
5. Identify and fix broken or inefficient features in existing systems.
6. Improve system stability and performance across ERP workflows.
7. Collaborate with internal teams for testing, debugging, and feature enhancement.
8. Focus primarily on debugging and system enhancement rather than greenfield development.

                    1. Strong understanding of Python fundamentals is required.

                    4. Strong command over SQL, including joins, filters, updates, and query optimization, is required.                
                                
                    5. Basic understanding of Git version control is important.                
                                
                    6. A strong debugging mindset and analytical thinking ability are essential.                
                                
                    7. The ability to understand and work with complex existing codebases is necessary.                
                                
                    8. Exposure to ERP systems or workflow-based applications is preferred.                
                                
                    9. Experience with backend debugging and API integration is beneficial.                
                                
                    10. Understanding of enterprise software architecture is desirable.                
                                
                    11. Experience working on large or legacy codebases is preferred.                
                                
                    12. Strong problem-solving ability is essential.                
                                
                    13. Close attention to detail is critical.

                    About Technoculture Research                
        
        Technoculture Research is re-imagining how the world measures health. We build micro-scale electrochemical laboratories that bring lab-grade accuracy directly into the hands of clinicians, community health workers, and even patients at home. Our platform integrates microfabricated electrodes, novel surface chemistries, and microfluidics to run protein, nucleic-acid, and metabolite assays within minutes. By replacing costly optical detection with electron sensing, we significantly reduce instrument and per-test costs, making precision diagnostics truly accessible. Our mission is to make diagnostics abundant, so every critical health decision is guided by immediate, affordable results.

title: Computer Vision And Image Processing
skills: C++ Programming, Computer Vision, C Programming, Deep Learning, Git, Linux, OpenCV, Python, Shell Scripting, Certificate, Letter of recommendation, Informal dress code, Free snacks & beverages, Job offer
description:
About the internship

    Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Design and implement robust classical image processing techniques such as filtering, thresholding, morphological operations, and edge detection, with a strong focus on mathematical and algorithmic understanding.
2. Develop computer vision modules using OpenCV (C++/Python) for tasks including geometric transformations, feature extraction, contour analysis, and tracking, beyond simple model-based detection.
3. Work with real-world image and video datasets, performing hands-on tasks such as raw data handling, frame-wise preprocessing, noise reduction, and ROI selection     not limited to ready-made AI datasets.
4. Apply knowledge of camera geometry, epipolar constraints, and 2D/3D transformations to solve vision problems like rectification, projection, stitching, and visual alignment.
5. Implement multiview geometry concepts such as homography estimation, camera calibration, stereo vision, and structure-from-motion, with an emphasis on coding from first principles when needed.
6. Design and maintain real-time video pipelines using GStreamer or similar frameworks, handling encoding/decoding, latency control, and stream synchronization.
7. Optimize vision algorithms for real-time performance on embedded or resource-constrained platforms (e.g., Raspberry Pi, Jetson Nano), including profiling and memory optimization.
8. Collaborate with hardware and embedded systems teams to integrate vision code with peripheral devices like cameras, sensors, and processing units.
9. Write modular, well-documented, and efficient code in C++, C, or Python, with clear separation between algorithmic logic and system interfaces.
10. Evaluate, benchmark, and compare multiple vision approaches based on accuracy, speed, robustness, and resource usage, using quantitative metrics, not just visual inspection.
11. Work with image and video datasets - cleaning, labeling, augmentation, and preprocessing - and build pipelines for tasks such as object detection, segmentation, feature extraction, and tracking using PyTorch, TensorFlow, and other deep learning frameworks.
12.   Apply quantization, pruning, and knowledge distillation to improve model efficiency.
13. Implement techniques like Grad-CAM, LIME, and SHAP to explain model predictions.
14. Use Git for structured version control, including branching strategies, commit hygiene, and team-based collaboration on codebases.
15. Contribute to system-level integration of vision modules, ensuring compatibility with video input/output systems, UI components, and network interfaces.
16. Stay current with academic and industrial advances in classical vision and real-time processing, while maintaining a critical view of deep learning as one of many tools rather than the only approach.
    Skill(s) required
    
                    C++ Programming
                    Computer Vision
                    C Programming
                    Deep Learning
                    Git
                    Linux
                    OpenCV
                    Python
                    Shell Scripting

                        Learn Deep Learning
                    
                                    
                        Learn Python

                3. are available for duration of 6 months                    
                                    
                4. have relevant skills and interests                    
                                
                
                Other requirements
            
                                    
                    1. Candidates with a core image processing and computer vision background.                
                                
                    2. Basic understanding of drone technologies, flight dynamics, and control systems.

description:
About the internship

    As a software engineer intern at Interface Design Associates Pvt. Ltd., you will have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects and gain hands-on experience in Python, Python libraries, C++ programming, data structures, and algorithms. You will be a valuable member of our dynamic team, contributing to the development of innovative software solutions. 

About the project:

We are developing a CAD/CAM software platform for our Metal 3D printing machine. The system includes slicing logic, geometry processing, G-code handling, machine integration, visualization, sensor integration and AI-assisted features. This is a prototype-stage deep-tech product already being beta-implemented at 3 customer sites.

Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Collaborating with the team to design and implement software solutions using Python and C++
2. Utilizing data structures and algorithms to optimize performance and efficiency of software systems
3. Conducting code reviews and providing feedback to enhance code quality
4. Working closely with stakeholders to understand project requirements and deliver high-quality solutions
5. Testing and debugging software to ensure functionality and reliability
6. Staying updated on industry trends and best practices in software development
7. Contributing to the continuous improvement of our development processes and methodologies

What you will work on- Depending on your strengths and interests, you may contribute to:

1. Core platform development in Python
2. GUI development (Qt/PySide)
3. Geometry processing and slicing logic
4. G-code processing and motion-related logic
5. Machine communication modules
6. Visualization and workflow improvements
7. AI/ML integration into CAD/CAM workflows
8. Research and experimentation for improving slicing strategies
9. Integration of different sensors into workflow
10. Testing 3D printing schema on machine

description:
About the work from home job/internship

    As an App Developer Intern at Refresh Kid LLC, you will have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects in the edtech industry using React Native and other cross-platform technologies. Your expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, React Native, APIs, and UI/UX design will be crucial in creating engaging and user-friendly apps for our young learners.

Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Collaborate with our development team to design and develop new features for our mobile applications
2. Implement and maintain APIs to ensure seamless communication between the app and server
3. Conduct thorough testing to identify and fix bugs and improve app performance
4. Assist in creating wireframes and prototypes to enhance the overall user experience
5. Stay up to date on the latest trends and technologies in mobile app development
6. Provide support in troubleshooting and resolving technical issues for end users
7. Contribute to brainstorming sessions and provide innovative ideas for app enhancements

This internship opportunity will allow you to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced and dynamic work environment, while working alongside industry professionals. If you are passionate about creating impactful and interactive educational apps, we want to hear from you! Apply now to join our team and make a difference in the lives of young learners.
